       Computer Science > Computation and Language 
     

     
       arXiv:2410.01294  (cs)
     
 
   
     
  [Submitted on 2 Oct 2024 ( v1 ), last revised 10 May 2025 (this version, v3)] 
     Title: Endless Jailbreaks with Bijection Learning 
     Authors: Brian R.Y. Huang ,  Maximilian Li ,  Leonard Tang              View a PDF of the paper titled Endless Jailbreaks with Bijection Learning, by Brian R.Y. Huang and 2 other authors 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: Despite extensive safety measures, LLMs are vulnerable to adversarial inputs, or jailbreaks, which can elicit unsafe behaviors. In this work, we introduce bijection learning, a powerful attack algorithm which automatically fuzzes LLMs for safety vulnerabilities using randomly-generated encodings whose complexity can be tightly controlled. We leverage in-context learning to
